events.output_text:
**Context Summary:**  
The security research team operates during standard business hours (9:00 AM – 6:00 PM, Monday–Friday) but may respond to urgent incidents or collaborate on critical tasks outside these hours. For non-emergency inquiries, email support is available 24/7, with responses typically provided within 24 hours. Contact details (e.g., security@org.com) and a dedicated helpdesk line are provided for immediate assistance.
